series_metadata.series_title: Record of Utility and Other Charges
series_metadata.series_description: To maintain a running record at general headquarters, districts, and posts of monthly charges at division facilities. (HP-80A)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: GHQ - Maintain for 3 years plus current, then destroy providing audit has been conducted. Fiscal will notify the districts and posts when they can destroy their copies., Paper: Wastepaper
